Spiked.FlavourText:
- Do you know of that little animal, with spikes, what is it called... ?
- Hedgehog? Porcupine?
- Huh? Ohh, yes... that one!
- And what is wrong with it?
- See this bullet? It is like an explosive porcupine!
Spiked.Description: A grenade round with no explosive damage, instead dispersing lethal 12.7x108mm BZT-44M projectiles upon detonation
Spiked.Explanation: Functions as a fragmentation trap. Anyone caught in its line of sight during detonation risks severe or lethal injury
